title: エリートトレーナーとの出会い

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, when we're training for the URA
Finale...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I run into Aoi Kiryuin, one of my colleagues and
an excellent trainer, along with her trainee,
Happy Meek.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Watching the two clumsily develop their bond, I
renew my commitment to my own trainee.
